parsed.mechanism: MoSA routes distinct tokens to each attention head via expert-choice routing, and a learned router computes a distribution over heads-as-experts that assigns each input token to a small subset, which produces content-based sparse attention with token-level load balancing.
parsed.transfer: The expert-choice token-selection mechanism from A is transferred to B's learned router-over-experts framework so per-head attention experts are populated by a learned token-to-expert distribution.
parsed.open_problem: Does replacing MoSA's expert-choice head routing with a learned token-choice router over attention-head experts improve quality-vs-sparsity trade-offs without incurring token-dropping load imbalance?
parsed.niche_name: Learned Token-Choice Routing for Sparse Mixture-of-Attention Heads
parsed.primary_quote: MoSA selects distinct tokens for each head with expert choice routing

envelopes.result: {"mechanism": "MoSA routes distinct tokens to each attention head via expert-choice routing, and a learned router computes a distribution over heads-as-experts that assigns each input token to a small subset, which produces content-based sparse attention with token-level load balancing.", "transfer": "The expert-choice token-selection mechanism from A is transferred to B's learned router-over-experts framework so per-head attention experts are populated by a learned token-to-expert distribution.", "open_problem": "Does replacing MoSA's expert-choice head routing with a learned token-choice router over attention-head experts improve quality-vs-sparsity trade-offs without incurring token-dropping load imbalance?", "niche_name": "Learned Token-Choice Routing for Sparse Mixture-of-Attention Heads", "primary_quote": "MoSA selects distinct tokens for each head with expert choice routing", "quote_source": "atom_a"}
